title: What is the difference between a subscriber and user in a board?
excerpt: Subscriber to a board vs normal user in a board

posts.author: supriya.k (Supriya)
posts.cookedHtml: Subscriber to a board vs normal user in a board

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @supriya.k and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can find everything about board members here.

Why are you asking? Is there some information you need specifically for building something?

Cheers,
-Matias

posts.author: supriya.k (Supriya)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Matias.Monday Thank you for replying. Since I m working on APIs I was curious to know how a subscriber is different from task assignee and team member.
So a subsciber gets notifications of updates on a board or item he is linked to.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again @supriya.k!

They will get notifications when those notifications are meant for everyone for a board that the user is subscribed to, or for everyone for an item the user is subscribed to
